steps.title: Notice the surprising accuracy
steps.content: The first sentence describes a crude method using cardboard and string. The next sentence says the method still produced a close approximation compared with a later computer result.

steps.title: Choose the contrast transition
steps.content: The matching transition means nevertheless, which fits the contrast between crude technique and accurate result. Choice B signals similarity, Choice C signals restatement, and Choice D suggests the result was expected rather than surprising. The answer is A.
